Flow.description: DS - 8.8.25 - Renamed flow to include 'sysops' naming convention and added 'Related Record Link' field to screenflow and assignment mappings 02.05.2026 - LK - Add faulth path + display text on related record char limit
Flow.label: Case - Screenflow - SysOps Request - New Case

fields.name: caseSubmittedText
fields.fieldText: Your case has been submitted! Click here to view

fields.name: Upload_file
fields.helpText: If checked, you will be prompted to upload a file on the next screen.

validationRule.errorMessage: URL must be 255 characters or less. Please shorten the link

fields.name: Error_Function
fields.fieldText: What were you doing when the error occurred?

value.stringValue: What record should be opted back in?
